title: Post Disaster Food Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Post Disaster Food Services 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term recovery assistance for Douglas County residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding. Assistance may include support with housing, home rehabilitation, debris clean up, emergency food, clothing and home furnishings, and mental health services. May be able to refer to home safety inspectors and well water testing assistance. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LOCAL OFFICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Locator tool to find out local information for ODHS offices. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by County Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This program is designed to help survivors of specific natural disaster events connect to ODHS Disaster Case Managers. Intake does not guarantee assistance. Disaster case workers may be able to assist individuals in identifying and applying for disaster recovery support or addressing urgent needs. Services will vary based on eligibility and need. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Residents of Oregon who have been affected by natural disasters Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 669-0554 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SELF SUFFICIENCY ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE SNAP REPLACEMENT BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF ODHS might be able to replace SNAP benefits if people lost food bought with SNAP during a disaster such as storms, flooding, power outages or fire. 500 Summer Street NE E48 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Households who receive SNAP who lost or disposed of food that was unsafe to eat due to storms, flooding, power outages or fires can request that replacement benefits be issued for the cost of the food lost. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (800) 699-9075 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LOCAL OFFICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SNAP REPLACEMENT BENEFITS
